description_long: This is a traditional wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed constructed from horizontal wooden slats, reinforced by vertical supports on the sides and ends. The cart features two large spoked wheels made of wood with a dark, possibly metal, rim, positioned centrally along the sides for balance and mobility. The front of the cart extends into two long, straight wooden handles, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The side panels are slightly raised, providing containment for transported goods, while the open slat design of the bed allows for drainage and reduces weight. The overall finish is matte, with a dark brown coloration that suggests weathered or stained wood. The construction appears robust, suitable for carrying moderate loads across urban or park environments.
description: A robust, dark wooden handcart with two large spoked wheels, raised side panels, and long straight handles for manual transport. The open slat cargo bed and sturdy frame make it ideal for carrying goods in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat end of the cart with horizontal slats and both wheels visible on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the large spoked wheel, raised side panels, and the full length of the handles extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open cargo bed with slatted floor and the two handles extending outwards.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other wheel, side rails, and the handles.
